case_title: REPUBLIC REALTY SERVICE, INC. vs. VAUGHN, LOUISE et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAUGHN, LOUISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 222 SCHWERIN ST. #304B S.F, CA. 94134 $2,625.88 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.88, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL
